arts.ttl: Man United want “extraordinary” player on Arsenal radar, set to scout him next week
arts.sum: Manchester United are lining up a summer move for the Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi. The 26-year-old central midfielder has been linked with a move to the Premier League in the past as well. Liverpool have failed to get a deal done for the Spanish international. arts.ttl: Napoli uninterested in Manchester United Osimhen offers
arts.sum: Napoli are uninterested in a potential player-plus-cash offer from Manchester United for Victor Osimhen, regardless of which players are proposed. Manchester United are among the clubs considering a summer deal for Osimhen, who is free to leave Napoli on a permanent basis. The Nigeria international is currently on loan at Galatasaray, where he has scored […] The post Napoli uninterested in Manchester United Osimhen offers first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'Cannot risk' - Ruben Amorim gives Alejandro Garnacho injury update before Man United vs Fulham
arts.sum: Man Utd play Fulham in the FA Cup fifth round today and Ruben Amorim has explained his team selection.

arts.ttl: Antony explains how he almost joined Man Utd's biggest rivals
arts.sum: Antony almost moved to a different Premier League club in the same summer he joined Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Fulham - FA Cup: Live score, team news and updates as Alejandro Garnacho is DROPPED to the bench after Ipswich outburst in one of three changes for the holders - as visitors make three changes from defeat at Wolves
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest live score, team news and updates as Manchester United host Fulham at Old Trafford in the fifth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'burst into race' for DREAM Arsenal signing
arts.sum: The Sweden international has been tipped to leave St James’ Park if they fail to secure Champions League qualification this season and Man Utd have now expressed their interest in signing him amid their pursuit of a new striker. Manchester United have reportedly “burst into the race” to sign Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Team News: Ruben Amorim confirms Man United XI for FA Cup showdown with Fulham at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting side for Sunday's FA Cup fifth-round contest with Fulham at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Fulham: FA Cup fifth round – live
arts.sum: Live FA Cup updates from 4.30pm UK time Why not email Daniel with your thoughts Fulham, meanwhile, will have restored players who were rested for this match. With their Premier League status secure, they’ve no reason not to go all-out for the Cup, and given the teams left, they’ve a decent chance of making something happen. Bassey is exactly the kind of centre-back Hojlund can spend an entire match fruitless fighting; Robinson is a one-man left-flank; and Iwobi has excellent ball-carrying capabilities. Amorim has little in the way of options. He’ll be devo’d about Dorgu, banned for the first of three games – already, his new signing had made a difference, giving United width, balance and physicality, doing the right things and building a promising partnership with Bruno Fernandes. Mazraoui, though a lovely footballer, offers little attacking threat from wing-back, likewise Diogo Dalot on the other side, while there could scarcely be less pace behind the nominal centre-forward, Rasmus Hojlund, both Eriksen and Joshua Zirzkee looking like they run in a wind-tunnel. arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to improve their attacking unit with the signing of Victor Osimhen at the end of the season. The 26-year-old Nigerian International is on loan at Turkish club Galatasaray from Napoli. He has 20 goals in all competitions and he is widely regarded as one of the best strikers in the world.
